creator: spambox@haruhiism.net
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #1)
I noticed that the commit is missing Makefile changes entirely and at this current moment, the only updated file is pkg-plist, which (predictably) breaks the build.

distinfo seems to have been updated, then rolled back, then reverted, then rolled back again.

Makefile was never touched.
